page.content: In the Seller Onboarding Metrics for January 2024, the total sellers stood at 1,200, with a conversion rate of 15.2% and active sellers totaling 300, generating an average revenue of €50K.

lines.text: In the Seller Onboarding Metrics for January 2024, the total sellers stood at 1,200, with a conversion rate of 15.2% and active
sellers totaling 300, generating an average revenue of €50K.

page.content: In February, new sellers increased to 1,500, reflecting a growth rate of 17.5%, with 400 active sellers and an average revenue of €75K. March saw further growth to 1,800 new sellers, a growth rate of 20.0%, 500 active sellers, and an average revenue of €100K. The trend continued in April with 2,000 new sellers, a growth rate of 22.0%, 800 active sellers, and an average revenue of €120K. By May, the number of new sellers reached 2,300, representing a growth rate of 23.5%, while the active sellers count remained at 800, with an average revenue of €140K. In Table 2, the GMV in EUR for Electronics was reported at 25M, with units sold at 1.2M and a growth rate of 15%, categorized as High Demand. Fashion & Apparel generated a GMV of 45M, with 2.5M units sold, reflecting a growth rate of 20%, classified under Trending Styles.

page.content: Home & Living achieved a GMV of 15M, with units sold at 0.8M and a growth rate of 10%, labeled as Seasonal Sales. Lastly, Toys & Games reported a GMV of 5M, with 0.3M units sold and a growth rate of 5%, identified as Niche Market.
